backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining access control, user profiles, posts, comments, activities, and CRUD/query methods using ordered maps and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Structured feature evidence report mapping implemented features to files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing responsibilities of various frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting up the root container, favicon, metadata, and script loading for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app defining routes, lazy-loaded pages, authentication checks, profile loading, and feed prefetching.
frontend/src/components/CommentsModal.ts: Modal for viewing, adding, and liking comments using optimistic React Query actions with sorted comment display and success feedback.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileModal: Modal for editing a user profile with fields, avatar upload/optimization, and save handling.
frontend/src/components/MainLayout.tsx: Main app layout providing header, routed content area, and bottom navigation tabs.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a single post with image, likes, comments preview, and navigation to profiles, with preload logic.
Modal showing full post details with likes, comments, comment creation, and post deletion.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Initial profile creation modal with fields, avatar upload/optimization, and save submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useImagePreloader.ts: Provides hooks for image preloading using IntersectionObserver, priority loading, and background loading with caching.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling login, stored identities, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, posts, and related optimistic updates using an actor API.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining themes, mobile interaction behavior, and feed layout utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app, wrapping it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx: Page component for creating posts with image selection, optimization, preview, and submission through the backend.
frontend/src/pages/CreatorProfilePage.ts: Displays another user's profile, including posts, likes, and follow controls, with modals for post detail and delete confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Renders the main feed sorted by timestamp with image preloading and update indicators, falling back to skeletons or an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/InboxPage.tsx: Shows user activity such as likes and comments, with profile navigation and a modal for viewing the related post.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Provides a simple login screen using Internet Identity with a branded UI and loading state.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays the logged‑in user's profile, posts, and edit/delete actions, using modals for editing and viewing posts.
frontend/src/utils/imageOptimization.ts: Utility for validating, downscaling, and compressing images before upload, with presets for posts and avatars.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL params (including hash), persist them in sessionStorage, and clear them as needed.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, custom colors, animations, and plugin setup.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s goals, architecture notes, known issues, and existing performance‑related features for an Instagram-like app.
